item.title: It Was a Call from God: The Horror of the Turpin Family
item.description: David and Louise Turpin were a California couple who, for years, abused and imprisoned their 13 children inside their Perris home. The siblings were starved, beaten, isolated, and often chained to beds or furniture in filthy conditions. Despite their ages, several were so malnourished they looked much younger. In January 2018, their 17-year-old daughter escaped through a window and called 911, leading police to uncover the abuse. Officers found the children living in extreme neglect, with little food, no education, and severe physical and psychological trauma. The case shocked the world because the family had maintained a carefully staged public image while hiding years of cruelty behind closed doors.

media:content.media:title: It Was a Call from God: The Horror of the Turpin Family
media:content.media:description: David and Louise Turpin were a California couple who, for years, abused and imprisoned their 13 children inside their Perris home. The siblings were starved, beaten, isolated, and often chained to beds or furniture in filthy conditions. Despite their ages, several were so malnourished they looked much younger. In January 2018, their 17-year-old daughter escaped through a window and called 911, leading police to uncover the abuse. Officers found the children living in extreme neglect, with little food, no education, and severe physical and psychological trauma. The case shocked the world because the family had maintained a carefully staged public image while hiding years of cruelty behind closed doors.

item.title: He Got OBSESSED After an Affair
item.description: When Oregon City veterinarian Steven Milner’s affair with married tech worker Tanya Fandrich ended, his obsession allegedly shifted to her husband, Kenny. Over the next four years, Kenny and Tanya say they were stalked, threatened, tracked with GPS devices, and terrorized while repeated reports to authorities seemed to go nowhere. Then, in January, Kenny Fandrich was found murdered — and Milner was accused. This case raises chilling questions about obsession, escalation, and whether warning signs were ignored until it was too late.

media:content.media:title: He Got OBSESSED After an Affair
media:content.media:description: When Oregon City veterinarian Steven Milner’s affair with married tech worker Tanya Fandrich ended, his obsession allegedly shifted to her husband, Kenny. Over the next four years, Kenny and Tanya say they were stalked, threatened, tracked with GPS devices, and terrorized while repeated reports to authorities seemed to go nowhere. Then, in January, Kenny Fandrich was found murdered — and Milner was accused. This case raises chilling questions about obsession, escalation, and whether warning signs were ignored until it was too late.
